summary: BoloBuddy mock run for hinglish_l1_002 recognized code-switching and two skipped function words.

feedback.child_feedback: Great effort! Ek chhota word miss hua - chalo fir se bolte hain.
feedback.adult_feedback: The child completed 6/8 expected words. Skipped word(s): to, maine. Fluency was growing with confidence 0.75. This is an educational assessment, not a clinical diagnosis.
suggested_practice: Read once with finger tracking so small words are not skipped.

child_result.feedback: Great effort! Ek chhota word miss hua - chalo fir se bolte hain.

adult_report.expected_text: I went to school, phir maine lunch khaya.
